text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, when I get to my office, Mejiro
Dober is already there waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
N-no I'm not. This is a perfectly normal time to be
here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the new essential oil I bought was really
effective, so I slept well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Actually, aren't you just late? Are you getting enough sleep?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: How are you? Are you getting enough sleep?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You should at least try to sleep more on your
days off. Use essential oils to help you or
something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's good... I still worry about you, though,
since you're always pushing yourself so hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm just warning you. I'd be negatively impacted
too if something happened to you, so you'd
better watch yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I should be the one saying that. If you'd like, I can
recommend you some essential oils.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should follow Mejiro Dober's example and get
more rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should follow Mejiro Dober's example and get
more rest.
